name: York County School Division
districtFact: York County School Division publishes student calendar information with first day, last day, student holidays, schools and offices closed dates, quarter starts, interim reports, report cards, early releases, and make-up day notes.

about.title: About York County School Division
about.content: York County School Division, commonly called YCSD, is a public school division serving students in York County, Virginia, including families in the Yorktown and Hampton Roads area. The district calendar supports PK-12 planning across elementary, middle, and high school schedules. It lists first day, last day, student holidays, schools and offices closed dates, early release days, quarter starts, interim reports, report cards, winter break, spring break, school hours, and make-up day notes.

about.title: How to Use This YCSD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide school-year planning. Families should confirm school-specific events, bell schedules, program calendars, athletics, graduation details, and weather make-up changes through York County School Division and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for York County Families
content: Track early release days separately because YCSD lists school-level dismissal times by grade span.
Review student holidays and early release days as possible make-up days before booking travel.
Use the official YCSD calendar page for updates when a school year does not include a public PDF link.
Confirm report card, interim, testing, and graduation details through school communications.

compareIntro: Compare the York County School Division calendar with other Virginia district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

customSections.label: Related York County and Virginia School Calendars
customSections.content: Use these related pages to compare YCSD school years and nearby Virginia district schedules.

districtFaqs.q: Which York County calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official York County School Division calendar information for the listed school years.

districtFaqs.q: Does York County publish early release dates?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The reviewed YCSD calendars include early release days and school-hour tables with early release dismissal times.

districtFaqs.q: Are student holidays potential make-up days in York County?
districtFaqs.a: The 2026-2027 YCSD calendar notes that all early release days and student holidays are potential make-up days.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify YCSD calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official York County School Division calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with YCSD.
